channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Geek Out a Living (with Danielle Radford)
item.description:
Danielle Radford joins Brennan to discuss her funny childhood, splitting the party, and wrestling.

Duration: 1:06:49

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, danielle radford
